content:
ESS Officer Meeting Minutes – Procès-verbal de la réunion des dirigeants de l'AÉG
Date: November 4th 2025 7pm
Location + Link - Lieu et lien: CBY A05 + Virtual, Google Meet
Discussions lead by Aiden McCooeye (he/him/il) and Eric Hagen (he/him/il).
* We acknowledge that we are gathered on the traditional and unceded territory of the Algonquin Anishinaabe Nation.
For generations, they have been the stewards of this land, and their deep connection to it continues to this day.
We recognize the enduring presence and contributions of the Algonquin people to this region.
We also acknowledge the painful history of colonization and the displacement of Indigenous communities from their ancestral lands.
We commit ourselves to learning, understanding, and honoring the Algonquin Nation's history and culture.

We recognize the importance of working collaboratively to create a more just and equitable future for all who call this land home.
________________

* Reimbursements and payments
* Processing VEMs requests
*

Providing input where needed
* Preparations for Frost
*

Sent student lists to subs
*
Chose Iron Ring camp leaders

* Attending FYIC at Queen’s this weekend - invoice paid, hosted delegate meeting
* Looking into car rental and selecting another delegate for CDE since Maria can no longer attend 🙁
* Maria: now my car (ryn is allowed to drive)
* CELC application post completed - promo request sent in - should be posted by November 10th (delegate registration is due on December 1st)
* Helping Rusafi with External Awareness Night on November 20th - promo request sent in, should be posted by November 10th
* Filmed a winter intramural reel with Alper last week to be posted today
* Arranged meeting with Carleton Hockey and Alper tomorrow to plan logistics around the event (will keep everyone updated)
* Attending a CFES General Assembly next weekend to discuss CFES membership fees for this year

* Post is out for winter intramurals
* Seems like we’re getting more teams for the winter semester :)
* PLEASE Sign up for intramurals would love to see some exec members too.
* External Awareness Night moved to November 20th

* Working on ESS Audit #1
* Working on reviewing sub-association financial audits
* Working with Nick with W&C financials
* Working with Steffen and uOEC team with BBQ and purchasing
* Monster4Math is back for the month of November

* Working with Cyrus on the first audit
* Reimbursements ongoing

* Civil event earlier today, gave the spiel on ESS. Hopefully more folks show up!
* Meeting with IEEE and CSSA academics to plan Hot Choco-Late Night Study. Decided on Nov 25th, 530-930. Open call for somebody with a car to help grab food day of :)
* W&C this weekend! For those who said yes in the poll on discord, please also complete the volunteer signup sheet :)

* Catering is finalized, 2000 for the deposit was given (thanks Aiden)
* W&C post was posted! (thanks hayley conall)
* Registration is currently up through zeffy, about 300 attendees so far?
* A volunteer form was created, 4 external responses so far and 5 yes’s on discord?
* Final meeting with C&R, about 7k was finalized with them
* Iron ring info session was attended where W&C along with W&C afterparty was promoted

* Updated inclusivity policy again (please look at 🥺)
* Continuing to make scholarship list

* Lots of posts
* Will send out the banner out this week to be printed
* Mailout tmr - send anything last minute tonight

* Updated Office Hours have been posted to the Instagram
* Winter Intramurals post & reel has been posted
* Wine & Cheese post has been reposted to the story
* DUSTED 50% of tickets sold notice was posted to the story
* Iron Ring Afterparty post has been posted
* Summer Semester Report story will be posted within the next day (I thought Hayden translated this already but I can’t find it)
* External Awareness Night & CELC post have been scheduled to be posted on November 10th, the links are scheduled in the linktree aswell
*  Currently working on the last things in the banner

* Sent form out for meeting with sub-association presidents
* Coordinating room booking and helping with judge acquisition for uOEC
* Office cleaning ongoing
* Acquired phone chargers for office, for public use but DO NOT LET THEM LEAVE OFFICE

* T-11 days to uOEC
* 120 sign ups
* 20 volunteers
* Costco run for food this weekend
* Continue to push people to sign up
* Hard deadline for guaranteed lunch is friday at midnight - Incentive
* Rule book is almost done, will be sent out upon completion.

* Inventory has been updated to accurate values for UOSU audit
* ESS logo patches are in
* Not a cult merch is selling (continue to promote)
* Cutting locks soon
* Developing patches for interdisciplinary design and “vive la resistance”
* Working on patch making event with Sydney

* DUSTED locked in, want to come up with some promo ideas so all help is welcome with that
* Patches should arrive the 13th, in time to distribute them at DUSTED
* Iron Ring After Party also locked in, gotta get the tickets ready to distribute once there
* Winter 2025 DUSTED refunds going smoothly, waiting on a few more replies before giving the money back to ESS
* 101 Week Coordinator:
* Term Over

* Formal clothing drive setting up, lots of RSGs are interested 🙂
* Hoping to start eng ball early bird tix mid-nov (50 early bird tix avail) but price tbd lol
* Poppies donation zeffy set up
* Zoe working on my cat rescue event for me :) (pivoted from bake sale to cookie decor)
* Beer olympics wants money but idk how much we r willing to give … budget vote for prob ~$200 pending
* Budgeted cookie decor event for Zoe, will book a room and choose a day as well (mid to end november)

* Not going to CDE cuz of work :c
* But my car will be lended
* My event happened and not too many people went :c
* Tho less money spent
* Trying to figure out how to spend my budget cuz i have 2k delegated to events outside of my planned ones

* Wanna enforce more strictly the procurement policy and would like to update it at BOD to have a 24hrs delay for VP Franco/Manager of Traduction to act on traductions.
* Still working out the details for the franco event.
* The initiative of Carolina for francophone class offers is now independent so we have nothing to do with it.
* Translated the president’s summer recap among other things

* Heard back from UOSU about sustainability caucus, it is not running this year.
* Planning upcycle patches event with vp services, alongside the upcycling club
* Looking through list of companies, possible industry night with a focus on sustainable innovation.

* Sports: 2 soccer teams?
* Alper: Not enough budget for 2 teams.
* Ashna: $1200 for all winter intramurals, enough for 2 teams.
* Cyrus: Could increase cost to engineering students for subsidising a second team
* Hayley: Don’t deprive students who want to make friends on a soccer team that opportunity when you can raise the price and still allow for the team to form.
* Show of hands, majority people wanted to increase to two soccer teams.
* President: For uOEC ask ur TAs, especially if ur in a 3rd or 4th year class they’re the most eager.

* Update Procurement policy to have a 24h window for vp franco/translation to apply changes and if no changes, they are able to go ahead with whatever it is - Yann Giffaux
* Show of hands, majority of people were in support of adding this motion to next Bod

* W&C signups are at 319 now
* Can i volunteer dusted - Hayley
* Comms: Can we book ao4 for next meeting
* VPFA: Assistance with assembling the BBQ

* President: Reach out if you need anything 🙂
*
Please send promo requests early!!!

From the meeting attendance, the officers include:
Aiden is the Co-President.
Eric is the Co-President.
Aiden is the President.
Eric is the President.
Ashna is the VP External.
Magno is the VP Social.
Cyrus is the VP Finance & Administration.
Zoe is the VP Philanthropic.
Sydney is the VP Sustainability.
Steffen is the VP Internal.
Maria is the VP Equity.
Yann is the VP Francophone.
Nick is the VP Academic.
Hayley is the VP Communications.
Alper is the Manager of Sports.
Adi is the Manager of IT.
Brooke is the Manager of Student Advocacy.
Hayden is the Manager of Translations.
Mehar is the Wine and Cheese Coordinator.
Rusafi is the Manager of External Awareness.
Ryn is the Finance Commissioner.
Victoria is the Francophone Outreach Commissioner.
Henri is the Manager of Sponsorship.
Krish is the Manager of Marketing.
Conall is the Manager of Social Media.
Amani Mohamed is the ERTW Commissioner.
Reema is the uOEC Commissioner.
Zoé is the Charity Commissioner.
Dakota is the 101 Week Coordinator.
Kristen Wells is the Sponsorship Liaison Commissioner.
Maya is the Chair of the Board.
Luke is the VP Services.
